options.a: wave-like disturbance in the monsoon regime of India, moving from east to west, with severe convective activity ahead of its trough.
options.b: small scale wave disturbance in the tropics, moving from east to west, with severe convective activity ahead of its trough.
options.c: disturbance in the higher levels associated with the equatorial easterly jet, moving from east to west, with severe convective activity in rear of its trough.
options.d: wave in a trade wind belt, moving from east to west, with severe convective activity in rear of its trough.
